column2: How much conflict of ideas is there in your work group? (Task Conflict)
How frequently do you have disagreements within your work group about the task of the project you are working on? (Task Conflict)
How often do people in your work group have conflicting opinions about the project you are working on? (Task Conflict)
How much relationship tension is there in your work group? (Relationship Conflict)
How often do people get angry while working in your group? (Relationship Conflict)
How much emotional conflict is there in your work group? (Relationship Conflict)
How often are there disagreements about who should do what in your work group? (Process Conflict)
How much conflict is there in your group about task responsibilities? (Process Conflict)
How often do you disagree about resource allocation in your work group? (Process Conflict)

column3: The presentation went smoothly, we just had some discrepancy when figuring out the economic analysis but that ended up working out fine.

This presentation was sloppy. It was not our best moment because most of us waited until the last moment to add our slides, me included. However, I did not have the equipment list until late the night before and I had finished my entire slides the morning of the presentation. I won't make excuses for my behavior but I also won't take responsibility for lack of effort on the group's part. Despite us switching to batch, most of our equipment was mostly the same. This would not have prevented the equipment list being fully updated days before the slides were actually due. We have a lot of work to do still and I hope all our heads are still in the game.
I think our group is doing very well.
